exploration_notes: Analysis identified 7 test coverage gaps in the Kafka consumer group coordinator. Key findings: (1) SyncGroup append callback silently drops assignment when group state transitions concurrently (HIGH risk), (2) classicGroupSyncToConsumerGroup has no error handling for append failures leaving response futures incomplete (HIGH risk), (3) LeaveGroup during COMPLETING_REBALANCE state is untested, (4) prepareAssignment SchemaException path on malformed protocol metadata is uncovered, (5) expirePendin
